misc: Rarely uses his driver, which has raised questions about his masculinity.
biography: Ossi, a representative of Kullo Golf Club, has carved a distinctive niche for himself within the challenging landscape of the Hector Trophée. As the Hector Trophée 2026 approaches, he is set to make his fourth appearance in this demanding pairs competition, solidifying his ongoing commitment to the event.

Despite his dedicated presence across three prior tournaments, Ossi has yet to claim either the coveted Hector Trophée with a partner or the individual Victor Trophy. His journey through these competitive events has been marked by a persistent pursuit of excellence, consistently engaging with the intricate formats, and undoubtedly aiming to etch his name into the list of champions.

A particularly notable aspect of Ossi's game is his infrequent reliance on the driver. This strategic choice, often a subject of spirited discussion among observers, hints at a nuanced and perhaps unconventional approach to course management. While some have playfully questioned this departure from traditional power play, it underscores his unique tactical mindset, as he endeavors to navigate the fairways with precision in his continued quest for a breakthrough victory in the Hector Trophée.
